_note: SELF-HOST repurposing of the RE-RANK 08 schema (D21): each entry = one remaining PROMPT-BUILD/CR, not a product slice. done_sentinel = the disk path whose presence+validity+class-discriminator == that build shipped (orchestrator STEP-0 derived-state key; D14/D20 analog). roadmap_version 6 = operator-directed ledger refresh (2026-06-11) after W6-REAUTHOR-REST 03-hld + 02-adr phases shipped + committed (6171502). roadmap_version 7 = operator-directed actual-state sync (2026-06-11): per-phase progress within W6-REAUTHOR-REST reflected (01-roadmap done + clean-room-verified; 00-aprd CLASSIFIER shipped 1/9) + drift-class lesson (incl. field-NAME variant) + 04-build spot-check TODO integrated into this ledger from now-deleted ephemeral memory (disk = source of truth, D20). Refresh moves all shipped CR-002 entries (W0, W1-W5, W6-REAUTHOR-04BUILD, W1b) into completed[]; remaining_sequence now = the genuinely-unshipped builds only. SCOPED to the CR-002 deterministic-spine wave + the CR-003 registry-fidelity fix; prior delivered waves (greenfield 10, bugfix 8) live on disk (D20), not re-listed. Disk is source of truth — this ledger is informational ordering, not the truth the loop derives from. roadmap_version 8 = operator-directed sync (2026-06-11) after 00-aprd GAP-DETECT re-authored + clean-room both-directions verified (5/9). roadmap_version 9 = operator-directed sync (2026-06-11) after 00-aprd QUESTION-GEN re-authored + clean-room both-directions verified (6/9). roadmap_version 10 = operator-directed sync (2026-06-11) after 00-aprd RECONCILE re-authored + clean-room both-directions verified (7/9). DERIVED FRONTIER = W6-REAUTHOR-REST (in progress): sentinel prompts/00-aprd/SYNTHESIZE.md still pre-CR -> wave not done; per-phase disk scan shows 03-hld + 02-adr + 01-roadmap re-authored (done) + 00-aprd 7/9 (CLASSIFIER/CRITIQUE/EXTRACT/EXTRACT-RULES/GAP-DETECT/QUESTION-GEN/RECONCILE), so the NEXT role = SYNTHESIZE. RECONCILE = SECOND markdown-vs-no lesson: its INPUT is seeded on disk, so the field-NAME drift class does NOT apply to inputs (runner reads real keys) — relocating output-SHAPE cues (kind enum, corroboration, reconcile_meta tallies) into steps 3/4/5 is the genuine home; a full input-schema enumeration in Step 1 is re-spec (AB3, ECONOMY-AUDIT caught it, trimmed). NEW DRIFT SUB-CLASS (latent-ambiguity-unmasked): a dropped inline schema can also remove a worked-example whose number was STALE (topics_reconciled:9 vs golden 10) AND whose surrounding cue was vague enough to let the runner re-derive the wrong value; fix = sharpen the cue's derivation source (count from INPUT rules[], not agreed[]), never re-add the schema/example. Both-directions tooling re-confirmed: a tier-precedence defect was INEFFECTIVE until ALL redundant homes ('tier 1>2>3' + 'executable canon is least-surprise default' + the 2 leads) were corrupted consistently. QUESTION-GEN is the FIRST markdown-output role re-authored (output 05-questions.md has NO registry schema): outputs[].schema=null, the inline ## Output template is KEPT as the sole structural home (no JSON ## Output schema to drop -> the example-loss/field-NAME drift class did not apply to output; proactively relocated the INPUT field-names into Task-step-1 prose since the dropped inputs: format-prose was their home). Drift class NOT triggered (clean first-pass, like GAP-DETECT). NEW LESSON (both-directions tooling, not a prompt drift): a value-defect planted in only Rule2+step3 was INEFFECTIVE because the ≤6 cap is restated in the ## Output template (3 redundant prose homes) and the runner honored the template; a conclusive planted-defect FAIL required corrupting the cap in ALL homes (cap=4 -> 4Q+9assumptions vs golden 6Q+7assumptions). W1b-REGISTRY-ENRICH shipped (schemas.lock v2: description on every property, element shapes tightened). The example-loss drift class surfaced during 03-hld (a dropped inline-schema EXAMPLE carried derivation value W1b's descriptions did not; relocate to prompt prose, never re-add a schema) is now applied proactively per phase. DRIFT CLASS (durable, integrated from ephemeral notes): dropping an inline `## Output schema` can lose either a derivation-value EXAMPLE or the SOLE prose-home of output field NAMES; both pass registry validation yet drift clean-room value-parity vs golden. Fix = relocate the cue (which-fields + derivation logic) into Task-steps prose; never re-add a schema, never assume registry descriptions substitute. Field-NAME variant verified on 00-aprd CLASSIFIER (runner invented SR-001/verbatim/wrong escape shape until prose named the keys + id format). OUTSTANDING: W6-REAUTHOR-04BUILD spot-check for the same drift (it shipped before the class was understood).

remaining_sequence.name: re-author 03/02/01/00 prompts, per phase
remaining_sequence.rationale: Per-phase, same bar: no inputs:/schema block, outputs[].schema id, clean-room value-parity vs _fixtures/greenfield-clean (both directions). One self-slice pass per phase; relocate any derivation-value cue AND any output field-name the prose did not already carry from the dropped inline schema into Task-steps prose (example-loss drift class incl. field-NAME variant — see top _note). PROGRESS (2026-06-11): 03-hld SHIPPED (8 roles; 2 drift fixes — DERIVE-COMPONENTS persistence-store cue, MODEL-FLOWS flow_counts cue), 02-adr SHIPPED (7 roles; 5 exact-parity + 2 judgment-variance DECISION-EXTRACT/TRIAGE proven not-drift via byte-identical logic diff), 01-roadmap SHIPPED (7 roles; clean-room-verified before its manual commit 72ac035 — operator-confirmed, NOT a latent-drift carrier), 00-aprd IN PROGRESS (CLASSIFIER + CRITIQUE + EXTRACT + EXTRACT-RULES + GAP-DETECT + QUESTION-GEN + RECONCILE shipped 7/9). RECONCILE (verified vs _fixtures/greenfield-canon/.aprd/03-grounding/rules-reconciled.json, both directions: known-good schema-VALID + EXACT value-parity PASS, planted-defect = tier-precedence inversion -> recommended_position 1-vs-0 FAIL): drift class NOT triggered for field-names (input is SEEDED on disk so runner reads real keys; ECONOMY-AUDIT correctly flagged my Step-1 full input-schema enumeration as re-spec AB3 -> trimmed to name input STRUCTURE only — rules[]/RULE*/unfetched_sources/extraction_meta — the OUTPUT-shape cues kind|opinion|mixed + corroboration + reconcile_meta are the genuine relocation home, kept in steps 3/4/5). NEW LESSON (latent-ambiguity-unmasked-by-schema-drop): the dropped inline `## Output schema` worked-example carried a STALE illustrative `topics_reconciled: 9` (golden=10) — the vague step-5 cue 'count of distinct input topics' let the first known-good run derive 9 from agreed[] topics (missing `quotes`, which is conflict-only); sharpened to 'count from INPUT rules[], NOT agreed[]; a conflict-only topic e.g. quotes still counts' -> clean-room hit 10. Both-directions TOOLING re-confirmed (QUESTION-GEN lesson): first planted defect (highest->lowest tier in only 2 of 4 homes) was INEFFECTIVE — runner reconstructed tier-1 from surviving cues ('tier 1 > 2 > 3' + 'executable canon is least-surprise default'); conclusive FAIL required corrupting ALL tier homes consistently. CRITIQUE field-name relocation = the 4 top-level ref fields aprd_ref/assumptions_ref/gaps_ref/class moved into Task-step-5 prose, clean-room exact value-parity both directions vs greenfield-clean/08-critique.json. EXTRACT-RULES (verified vs _fixtures/greenfield-canon/rules-extracted.json, both directions: known-good 15 rules schema-VALID/0 structural-mismatch PASS, planted-defect 13 rules FAIL): drift = ATOMICITY-class, not field-name — relocated cues (top-level sources_ref/class/stack derivation, topic grouping-not-unique semantics, extraction_meta field-names+sum-invariants) landed clean, but the dropped schema's atomic-split signal needed a sharper prose mechanic (Rule 6 tier-2 'count clauses not sentences' — compound 'prefer const, never var' / 'four spaces. no tabs.' = 2 rules each) before clean-room hit 15 not 13. GAP-DETECT (verified vs _fixtures/greenfield-clean/.aprd/04-gaps.json, both directions: known-good schema-VALID + disposition-determinism + unknown-accounting + gap_counts-invariant + greenfield-baseline-refs-OMITTED all hold PASS, planted-defect = blast_radius->disposition inversion FAIL): drift class NOT triggered — relocated cues (top-level key-set {extraction_ref,grounding_ref,class,gaps,dismissed_unknowns,gap_counts}, greenfield OMITS baseline_map_ref/baseline_aprd_ref vs old schema-comment's misleading 'null', gap_counts 4 sub-keys + total==gaps.length & tier-sum invariant, mint-G* + recommended_default-verbatim) all landed first-pass; 15-vs-golden-13 gaps + 1 cosmetic = benign judgment-variance (cosmetic correctly got disposition:assume), not drift. ECONOMY-AUDIT findings inherited verbatim from pre-CR original deferred to W9 (CLASSIFIER 4, CRITIQUE 4, EXTRACT-RULES 4, GAP-DETECT 3: I1 Role 'Load-bearing output' no-objective + I2 'Assume extraction is a trap' mandate-narration-in-role-identity + I3 'Mis-tiered gap is failure' no-objective — all byte-identical to pre-CR body, confirmed not new bloat via Role-region diff; same five-categories<->anti-false-positive pattern shipped in 02-adr/CRITIQUE). QUESTION-GEN (verified vs _fixtures/greenfield-clean/.aprd/05-questions.md, both directions: known-good 6Q(G1-G6)+7assumptions(G7-G13) value-parity PASS, planted-defect cap=4 -> 4Q+9assumptions FAIL): FIRST markdown-output role (output has NO registry schema) -> outputs[].schema=null, inline ## Output template KEPT as sole structural home (no JSON schema to drop); proactively relocated INPUT field-names {gaps,id,interpretations,recommended_default,blast_radius,disposition,refs} into Task-step-1 prose (the dropped inputs: format-prose was their home). Drift class NOT triggered (clean first-pass). Both-directions TOOLING lesson: a value-defect must corrupt EVERY prose home of the constraint — the ≤6 cap is restated in 3 homes (Rule2, step3, ## Output template), so a Rule2+step3-only defect was ineffective (runner honored the template cap=6); cap=4 across all homes gave the conclusive FAIL. Derived NEXT = SYNTHESIZE (then VERIFY — 2 roles remain). Wave done when the 00-aprd SYNTHESIZE sentinel is re-authored. Economy-audit residue + LOW findings (RECONCILE-CRITIQUE target:none sentinel, RESOLVE-LOCAL brownfield escalations shape) deferred to W9.

remaining_sequence.name: reconcile ALL accumulated lint + ECONOMY-AUDIT findings across the re-authored corpus
remaining_sequence.unit: prompts/**/*.md lint-clean + ECONOMY-AUDIT-clean (both-directions) + prompts/_economy-audit.md Rule-2 / lint-profile calibration where a finding is a dual-mode false-positive
remaining_sequence.rationale: Terminal sweep. Every prompt's lint + ECONOMY-AUDIT residue deferred per-wave during W6/W7 (defer-not-chase, avoids over-stripping the standalone-PART-A/B dual-mode design) is resolved to EXACTLY ONE of: (a) prompt DELETE/REWRITE — genuine AB1/AB7 debt; (b) prompts/_economy-audit.md Rule-2 calibration — a dual-mode standalone-Part restatement is sanctioned, NOT a duplicate (the auditor mis-fires, fix the auditor not the prompt, routes_to:canon); (c) lint-profile threshold note in the stack profile. Confirmed mis-fire seen in 03-hld: MODEL-DATA Register-block 'starvation' is a false positive (short Register is corpus convention). done_sentinel .roadmap/09-economy-reconcile.json records per-prompt lint verdict:clean + economy-audit verdict:clean across the whole corpus + a both-directions proof (planted-bloat copy still BLOCKED). Discriminator: zero prompt carries an unresolved blocking lint/audit finding AND the report's both-directions proof holds. NEVER ADD an instruction to silence a finding (AB9 keystone).

remaining_sequence.name: pack gate: wire all selftests, re-skin, ship
remaining_sequence.rationale: Compound: pack.mjs runs all selftests (validator + resolver + graph-lint + det modules + emitters + economy-lint) green; dist/adp-v<ver>.tgz ships. Lands AFTER W9 so the corpus is economy-clean in the tarball. No tarball if any selftest mis-proves. Validator selftest now includes W1b's tightened both-directions proof.
